programs.title: Pit Bulls and Parolees
programs.desc: Moe and Lizzy rescue a sick, scared stray, but a diagnosis proves tricky; a friend of the rescue visits in hope of adopting a dog that has previously been overlooked; new mom Tania struggles to find a balance between life and work at Villalobos.

programs.title: I Was Prey
programs.desc: Hiking in the Montana mountains, trail engineer Todd Orr is attacked twice by grizzly bear protecting her cubs; during a vacation in the Bahamas, Tiffany Johnson is snorkeling when she finds herself face-to-face with a tiger shark.

programs.title: I Was Prey
programs.desc: Micki Glenn is attacked by a shark during a dive trip; hours from the nearest medical facility, she has to rely on her husband and friends to save her life; a couple is attacked by a giraffe while on safari.

programs.title: I Was Prey
programs.desc: Paul Templer is leading a canoe safari on the Zambezi River near Victoria Falls when a hippopotamus bursts to the surface and drags him into the water; in Texas, an animal pounces on 5-year-old Jade DeMoss.

programs.title: I Was Prey
programs.desc: Andrea Schlake volunteers at an animal sanctuary when a chimpanzee escapes its enclosure and chases her down; a great white shark knocks surfer Todd Endris off his board and attacks him.

programs.title: I Was Prey
programs.desc: Diver Tim Saxon films underwater at the Great Barrier Reef and gets stung by an Irukandji jellyfish, one of the world's most venomous animals; a grizzly bear attacks forester George Knoll in the remote Great Bear Rainforest.
